analysis.reasoning: The tweet frames the EU as a successful, united actor and highlights benefits for European citizens (safer and more prosperous), while calling for a stronger EU able to speak out and act for peace globally. This maps to EU1 (successful story), EU2 (united), EU3 (useful for citizens), and EU6 (contributes to a better world). It does not clearly align with EU4 (avant-garde actor) or EU5 (global champion of broad fair causes) in this context.
